recipients.name: Delroy Waugh
recipients.title: Program & People Strategist (FUJIFILM Holdings America Corporation)
recipients.linkedin_note: Hi Delroy, this is Jamie! I recently applied for the Culture & Employee Experience Specialist role at FUJIFILM and came across your profile on the people-programs side. I come from an Organizational Psychology + people background and would love to connect and hear about your work there. Thanks!
recipients.email_draft:
Hi Delroy,

I hope you're settling into the week well! Apologies if this is a bit out of the blue — I came across your profile while looking into the Culture & Employee Experience Specialist role at FUJIFILM, which I recently applied for, and wanted to reach out personally in case the application alone doesn't capture the full picture.

I'm trained in Organizational Psychology, and I run cross-functional programs and support the employee experience — pairing qualitative and quantitative analysis to surface what actually moves engagement. Most of that has been at a fast-growing startup and a multinational, which is part of why a global company like FUJIFILM resonates with me.

I'd genuinely love to hear what the Culture & EX team is like day-to-day, and how you've found building people programs there. I've attached my resume — thanks so much for your time, Delroy!

Warmly,
Jamie
